positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a vibrant nocturnal city skyline viewed through a retro wavy window. The scene should feature abstracted geometric shapes of buildings in shades of teal, sapphire blue, and deep magenta, accented by glowing orange and yellow neon signs that form stylized constellations. Incorporate delicate, glowing fireflies or stylized geometric 'stars' floating between the buildings. The style should be graphic vector art meets synthwave aesthetic, designed with strong central composition, high contrast, and clean, thick silhouettes. Use radial gradient lighting emanating from the neon sources. Suitable for screen printing on a dark background.
negative: blurry, low resolution, grainy, noisy, text, watermark, logo, signature, anime, cartoon, childish, messy, artifacts, bad anatomy, deformed, over-saturated, poor quality
